plan.intent: Apply requireAuth middleware to every route under /todos (GET /todos, POST /todos, DELETE /todos/:id)

steps.rationale: GET /todos currently has no auth guard; requireAuth must be added to protect it.

steps.description: Apply requireAuth middleware to POST /todos (confirm/no-op if already present)
steps.rationale: The graph shows an applies_middleware edge already exists for this route; including the step ensures consistency and lets the executor surface any discrepancy.
DELETE /todos/:id currently has no auth guard; requireAuth must be added to prevent unauthenticated deletions.

plan.notes: From the graph, POST /todos already has requireAuth applied (applies_middleware edge exists). We still include it so the executor can confirm/no-op cleanly. GET /todos and DELETE /todos/:id are missing the middleware and need it added.
